# Purpose
Create a string library in zig that is heavily inspired by C++.  It will not be an exact copy but should implement the bulk of methods.

# Scope

## In Scope

Methods
- Mutating 
- Constructors (init in zig 
- Search
- Informational
- Memory Management
  
## Out of Scope
- Iterators
- Overloaded Operators

# References
- https://cppreference.com/cpp/header/string
- https://cplusplus.com/reference/string/string/
- https://www.w3schools.com/cpp/cpp_ref_string.asp
